data.title: Japan’s FSA proposes two-category classification for digital assets in new crypto regulation framework
data.description:
Japan plans to classify crypto assets into two categories: Type 1, which includes utility tokens, and Type 2, which includes Ethereum and Bitcoin.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-proposes-classification-for-cryptos/

data.title: This year's top ETF strategy? Shorting Ether — Bloomberg Intelligence
data.description:
Betting against Ether has been the best performing exchange traded fund (ETF) strategy so far in 2025, according to Bloomberg analyst Eric Balchunas. Two ETFs designed to take two-times leveraged short positions in Ether claimed (ETH) first and second place in a Bloomberg Intelligence ranking of the year’s top-performing funds, Balchunas said in a post on the X platform.   In the year-to-date, ProShares UltraShort Ether ETF (ETHD) and T Rex 2X Inverse Ether Daily Target ETF (ETQ) are up approximately 247% and 219%, respectively, Bloomberg Intelligence data showed.  The implications for Ether are “brutal,” Balchunas said
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/this-year-s-top-etf-strategy-shorting-ether-bloomberg-intelligence?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Analyst who called 2024 rally warns of yield shock
data.description:
Bitcoin hits $83K as CPI rises 2. 4% and Treasury yields surge—Arthur Hayes says 'UP ONLY' mode could kick in this weekend.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/arthur-hayes-says-up-only-for-bitcoin-as-cpi-hits-2-4

data.title: Ripple just moved 200 million XRP: Is a dump incoming?
data.description:
A Ripple-linked account has executed a massive on-chain transaction, transferring 200 million XRP, valued at approximately $410 million based on the market price of $2.05 on April 11. The timing and scale of the move have sparked speculation across the crypto community, especially as XRP trades near critical support amid ongoing legal uncertainty and volatile market conditions.  With investor sentiment fragile and broader trends in flux, the transaction has raised concerns about the token’s near-term outlook
source: https://finbold.com/ripple-just-moved-200-million-xrp-is-a-dump-incoming/

data.title: Swedish lawmaker urges government to establish Bitcoin reserve amid global economic shifts
data.description:
Swedish Member of Parliament Rickard Nordin has formally questioned the government about whether it will allow the central bank to add Bitcoin (BTC) to the country’s foreign currency reserves.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/swedish-lawmaker-urges-government-to-establish-bitcoin-reserve-amid-global-economic-shifts/

data.title: SEC hints at adopting ‘sandbox’ approach to regulating firms that trade crypto securities
data.description:
The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) may propose a sandbox approach to crypto trading, before deciding on a new framework tailored to the challenges of digital tokens.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sec-hints-at-adopting-sandbox-approach-to-regulating-firms-that-trade-crypto-securities/

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Proposes Ethereum L1 Privacy Roadmap, Here’s More
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin shared a roadmap to scale the network’s privacy without altering the consensus.
source: https://zycrypto.com/vitalik-buterin-proposes-ethereum-l1-privacy-roadmap-heres-more/

Yet again a gap that's made during the weekend and closed within the same week. Been a theme recently.
Bitcoin Whale Addresses Record Over $3.6 Billion Inflow as Bulls Bid Recovery
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) has shown signs of a long-term upward momentum in the past 48 hours. The crypto markets surged following similar macro sentiments after President Trump announced a 90-day pause on tariffs. This led to a jump in whale holdings and other positive movements keen to boost bull sentiments. The Largest Single-Day Inflow in Two […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/bitcoin-whale-addresses-record-over-3-6-billion-inflow-as-bulls-bid-recovery/
